---
title: "Teori_ART"
author: "Cheisa Billy Putra Antoni"
date: "2026-03-14"
output: html_document
---

# ART TEORI
```{r}
library(openxlsx)
df2 <- read.xlsx("C:\\Users\\BiliL\\Downloads\\Project Coding GitHub\\Praktikum_ART\\Book1.xlsx", sheet = 2)
head(df2)
```

```{r}
# Asumsi Linearitas Pakai Scatter Plot
x <- df2$x
y <- df2$y
model3 <- lm(formula = y ~ x - 1, data = df2)
plot(fitted.values(model3), residuals(model3), main = "Plot Residual",
  ylab = "Residual",
  xlab = "Fitted Values", pch = 19
)

# Garis Fit Dengan Intercept
# abline(lm(y ~ x), col = "blue")

# Garis Fit Tanpa Intercept
abline(lm(fitted.values(model3) ~ residuals(model3) - 1), col = "red")

# Hitung jumlah residual
#res <- residuals(model3)
#sum(res)
```
